import React from 'react'
import CommonSection from './../shared/CommonSection'
import { Container,Row, Col } from 'reactstrap'


const SearchResult = () => {
  return (
    <>
    <CommonSection title={'Tour Search Result'}/>
    <section>
      <Container>
      
      </Container>
    </section>
    </>
  )
}

export default SearchResult
